title: Fractions
blurb: Placeholder — add, subtract, multiply, and divide fractions and mixed numbers.

lessons.title: Introduction to Fractions
lessons.concreteComparison: Placeholder — real-world opener authored in Step 3. Example: a pizza cut into 8 slices; eating 3 slices means you ate $\frac{3}{8}$ of the pizza.
lessons.objective: Placeholder — identify the numerator and denominator of a fraction and represent fractions on a number line.
concept: Placeholder concept paragraph. A fraction $\frac{a}{b}$ represents $a$ parts out of $b$ equal parts.
